title: Lakehouse Real-Time (Beta) ​
body:
**June 30, 2026**

Lakehouse Real-Time (Lakehouse//RT) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Lakehouse//RT is a serverless SQL warehouse type built for low-latency, high-concurrency workloads, delivering sub-second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables. Use it to serve analytical data to applications, run operational analytics, and power dashboards for hundreds to thousands of concurrent users. See [Lakehouse Real-Time](/aws/en/compute/sql-warehouse/real-time).
